calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S A DELAWARE CORPORATION Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

The unopposed motion for assignment of rights, restraining order, and turnover order is granted.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and conforms to the relief sought in paragraphs numbered 1-3 in the notice of motion.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For To Correct The Judgment From Erroneous $16,124.50 To The Correct Judgment To $17,124.50
Off Calendar Feb-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion To Correct The Judgment From Erroneous $16,124.50 To The Correct Judgment To $17,124.50.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Moving party Align Technology brings this unopposed motion to correct the judgment entered by this court on December 30, 2024. Specifically, the judgment entered in favor of Align on December 30, 2024 contains a mathematical error; the itemized amounts awarded by the court are added incorrectly and the listed total does not match the itemized amounts. The motion is granted. The court will issue an amended judgment awarding damages in the amount of $14,569.47, prejudgment interest at $1,185.03; attorney fees at $1000; and costs at $370, for a total of $17,124.50.

Order submitted. Judgment submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
